author: Ken
content:
Why is my stakekey balance less than my actual balance at adapools?  Is that even possible?

https://adapools.org/stake/stake1uxjjqeu292h56 .... shows a balance that is roughly 9% lower than the balance shown at https://adapools.org/address/addr1q99pujmg0mt4rdyg0xnpjc7he7g ....

author: Peter
content:
hmmm none of those addresses look right at all.

I wouldn't use ADAPools as the data isn't always 100% accurate. There are times when the data is just waaaay off.

Throw your stake key at CardanoScan or PoolTool.io. Better data there and more accurate all the time.
